overview: Zaltana Wellness specializes in reversing Type II diabetes and pre-diabetes through personalized health plans and 1:1 coaching from a certified lifestyle medicine nurse practitioner. The clinic provides comprehensive health assessments and works as both a healthcare provider and health coach to support chronic illness reversal and wellness optimization.
highlights: 1:1 coaching from certified lifestyle medicine nurse practitioner
Type II diabetes and pre-diabetes reversal
Comprehensive health assessment with personalized plans
targetAudience: People with type II diabetes or pre-diabetes seeking to reverse their condition through lifestyle medicine and personalized coaching.
